title: Daringly Spicy Brazilian Chicken Skewers
description: A flavorful and adventurous Brazilian dish featuring chicken skewers with a spicy kick, umami taste, and a cheesy pull, all while being Whole30-friendly.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together hot sauce, coconut milk, tandoor spice blend, and lime juice.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade, then cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated chicken, bell peppers, and onions onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through and the vegetables are tender.
While the skewers are cooking, melt the dairy-free cheese shreds in a saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly.
Once the skewers are done, brush them with the melted cheese and serve immediately.
Garnish with minced garlic and serve with your favorite sides.
